onboarding.tagline:
Dandazon isar da kaya mafi sauri
cikin Najeriya.
onboarding.sheetTitle:
Da Sauri. Amintacce.
Isar da Kaya Mai Wayo.
onboarding.sheetSub: Haɗa kai da ƴan tura isar kaya da aka tabbatar, bi kayan da ake jigilar su a lokaci na gaske, kuma sami mafi kyawun farashi atomatik.
onboarding.alreadyHaveAccount: Ina da asusun da ke nan
onboarding.featureSameDay: Isar da kaya a rana guda a Lagos, Abuja & PH
onboarding.featureGps: Bin diddigin GPS kai tsaye akan kowane kaya
onboarding.featureVerified: Ƴan tura isar kaya da aka tabbatar. Kayan inshorani.

auth.startDelivering: Fara isar da kaya da Seirs yau
auth.passwordPlaceholder: Haruffa 8+ tare da babba, ƙarami, lambar/alamar
auth.ageConfirm: Ina tabbatar ina da shekara 18 ko sama da haka
auth.termsConfirm: Na yarda da Sharuɗɗan Sabis, Ka'idodin Hali na Mai Tuka, da Manufofin Sirri
auth.alreadyAccount: Kuna da asusun da ke nan?
auth.fillAllFields: Don Allah cika duk filayen da ake buƙata kuma zaɓi nau'in abin hawa.
auth.invalidPhone: Shigar da lambar wayar Najeriya mai inganci (misali 08012345678).
auth.weakPassword: Kalmar wucewa dole ta kasance haruffa 8+ tare da babba, ƙarami, lamba ko alamar.
auth.passwordMismatch: Kalmomin wucewa biyu ba su dace ba.
auth.ageRequired: Dole ka tabbatar cewa kana da shekara 18 ko sama da haka.
auth.termsRequired: Dole ka yarda da Sharuɗɗan Sabis da Manufofin Sirri.
auth.loginFailed: Shiga ya gaza. Don Allah gwada kuma.
auth.registrationFailed: Rijista ta gaza. Don Allah gwada kuma.

home.goOnlineToEarn: Shiga layi don fara samun kuɗi
home.goOnlineToReceive: Shiga layi don fara karɓar buƙatun aiki.
home.noJobsNearby: Babu ayyuka kusa. Kasance cikin layi — sabbin buƙatun suna zuwa akai-akai.

earnings.title: Kuɗin da aka samu
earnings.goalReached: An cimma burin! Ci gaba don samun lada.

history.title: Tafiye-tafiyena
history.completeToSee: Kammala isar da kaya don ganin su a nan.

kyc.title: Tabbatar da Asali
kyc.documentsSubmitted: {{uploaded}} daga cikin {{total}} takardu da ake buƙata an ƙaddamar
kyc.allSubmitted: An ƙaddamar da duk takardu — za a duba cikin awanni 24
kyc.nationalIdFrontDesc: ID da gwamnati ta bayar ko takardun NIN slip (gefen gaba)
kyc.nationalIdBackDesc: Gefen baya na Shaidar Ƙasa ko takardun NIN slip
kyc.selfieDesc: Hoton fuskarka mai haske — ana amfani da shi a bayanan sirri na mai tuka
kyc.driversLicenceDesc: Lasisin tuka na Najeriya mai inganci
kyc.vehiclePhotoDesc: Cikakken hoto na abinka hawa wanda ke nuna lambar faranti
kyc.ownershipProofDesc: Rijista ko takaddun shaida na mallakar abin hawa
kyc.insuranceCertDesc: Takardar inshorani ta abin hawa mai inganci
kyc.guarantorDesc: Wasiƙa daga mai tabbatarwa (an ba da shawarar, ba tilas ba)
kyc.needInsurance: Kuna buƙatar inshorani na abin hawa?
kyc.viewPartners: Duba masu ba da inshorani abokan haɗin gwiwarmu
kyc.chooseSource: Zaɓi yadda za ka bayar da takarda
kyc.libraryPermission: Ana buƙatar damar zuwa dakin karatu na hoto.
kyc.referralNote: Seirs na samun kuɗin tura lokacin da kuka sayi ta wajen abokin haɗin gwiwa. Wannan baya shafar kuɗin ku.

profile.title: Bayanan Sirri
profile.earningsWallet: Kuɗin da aka samu & Jakar kuɗi
profile.viewPastDeliveries: Duba ayyukan isar da kaya na baya
profile.signOutConfirm: Shin kuna da tabbacin cewa kuna son fita?
profile.supportAlert: Kira mu a 0700-SEIRS-01 ko aika imel zuwa drivers@seirs.app

ratings.title: Darajoyina
ratings.belowThreshold: Daraja ƙasa da iyaka ta mafi ƙaranci
ratings.belowThresholdBody: Matsakaicin ku ({{average}}) yana ƙasa da {{threshold}}. Darajoji ƙananan da ke ci gaba na iya haifar da bita na asusun. Duba shawarwari a ƙasa don ingantawa.
ratings.tip1: Isa a lokaci — a kan lokaci shi ne ke ƙara maki ku mafi yawa
ratings.tip2: Riƙe fakiti da hankali kuma da hannaye biyu
ratings.tip3: Kasance mai ladabi, ƙwararru, kuma ku gaɓatar da abokan ciniki da zuciya
ratings.tip4: Kiyaye abinka hawa tsabta a ciki da wajen
ratings.tip5: Tabbatar isar da kaya da hoto bayyanannen shaida na isar da kaya

withdrawal.title: Cire Kuɗin da aka Samu
withdrawal.exceedsBalance: Adadin kuɗi ya wuce ragowar kuɗi
withdrawal.withdrawalsNote: Cire kuɗi yawanci yana isa cikin mintuna 30 ta hanyar canja wurin NIP.

active.title: Isar da Kaya Mai Gudana
active.proofHint: Dauki hoto yayin da kuke bayar da fakiti. Ana buƙata don tabbatar isar da kaya.
active.proofRequiredMsg: Don Allah dauki hoto kafin tabbatar isar da kaya.
active.confirmDeliveryMsg: An ba da fakiti ga mai karɓa?
active.deliveryCompleteMsg:
Kun isar da {{trackingCode}} da nasara.

Aza kuɗin zai kasance cikin jakar kuɗin ku nan ba da jimawa ba.
active.deliveryNotFound: Ba a sami isar da kaya ba
active.cameraPermission: Ana buƙatar damar zuwa kyamara don dauki hoto shaida na isar da kaya.

language.title: Harshe & Yanki
language.currencyNote: Ana sarrafa duk ma'amaloli a cikin Naira ta Najeriya (NGN). Sauran kuɗaɗe suna don nunawa ne kawai.

common.error: Wani abu ya faru. Don Allah gwada kuma.
